title: euodia suaveolens var. ridleyi
intro: Euodia suaveolens var. ridleyi, also known as the Malay pepper tree, is a variety of the Euodia suaveolens plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Euodia suaveolens var. ridleyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
